name: Count Palindromic Subsequences
description: Given a string s, return the number of different non-empty palindromic subsequences in s. Since the answer may be very large, return it modulo 10^9 + 7. A subsequence is a sequence derived by deleting some or no characters without changing the order.

examples.output: 6 (b, c, bb, bc, cb, bccb — wait, palindromic ones: b, c, bb, cc, bcb, bccb → 6)

constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 1000. s consists only of lowercase English letters.

performance.stress_intent: exercise distinct-palindromic-subsequence DP with repeated-boundary 200-length strings that reject non-memoized recurrence locally
